title: narcissus bulbocodium subsp. citrinus
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium subsp. citrinus, also known as the citrine jonquil or small leaved jonquil, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Narcissus bulbocodium subsp. citrinus typically involve the bulb being dried and ground into a powder, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
